text.title: product-development-trends Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-development-trends as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: WebSearch ranked by SEO not freshness — sorting by published date is skipped, producing stale results summarized as current
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sort by published date in the signal scraper before summarizing. Freshness of source is the primary quality signal in trend research.

failure-mode.description: Rapid pivots, quarterly cycles added as an unsourced cadence claim generated from LLM defaults rather than evidence
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Treat any unsourced cadence claim as hallucinated. Require a named study (DORA, Stack Overflow) with cohort label before accepting a cadence benchmark.

failure-mode.description: Three citations to the same secondary article (HBR, McKinsey blog) inflating confidence for a claim
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Multiple citations to the same source ≠ multiple sources. Require independent primary sources; citations to the same base article count as one.

failure-mode.description: Human-in-the-loop checkpoint missing before the synthesis lands in .aidocs/product_docs/
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without the gate, hallucinated vendor names and fabricated market data points land in deliverables that get circulated to investors and boards. The checkpoint is non-negotiable.

failure-mode.description: Token cost blowup: synthesis on opus with 50+ raw signals exceeds 100k tokens
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-filter with the signal-scorer.py script before paying for opus synthesis. A scored and trimmed set of signals produces better output at 20% of the cost.

failure-mode.description: Duplicate-content trap: both market and product sibling methodologies produce a file called trend-report.md and one silently overwrites the other
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Explicitly namespace files: market side writes to trend-report-market.md, product side to trend-report-product.md. Ask "is the deliverable a market memo or a product memo?" before running.
